evidence.source_title: Iran Appoints Alireza Bigdeli as New Ambassador to Afghanistan
evidence.description: Career MFA diplomat: chargé d'affaires Kazakhstan (1991–1992), ambassador to Azerbaijan (1995–2000), Cyprus (2007–2010), Turkey (2012–2015), Afghanistan (2024–present).

editorial_notes: Dates corrected: Azerbaijan posting was 1995–2000, not 2016–2021.
